creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
This updates bro from 2.1 to 2.2. Other changes include:

	    - Add stage support
	    - Update MASTER_SITES
	    - Add LICENSE
	    - require sysutils/file < 9.1-RELEASE to get libmagic >= 5.04

	This PR should processed at the same time the security/broccoli
	PR I am submitting; I will follow up with that PR number
	once one is assigned.

Fix: Remove/delete all current patch files:

	    files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
	    files/patch-aux-broctl-CMakeLists.txt
	    files/patch-aux-broctl-etc-broctl.cfg.in
	    files/patch-src-Expr.cc
	    files/patch-src-logging-Manager.cc

	And then apply the attached patch set.
